name: Zengine REST API
description: Zengine is a platform for managing data through workspaces, forms, records, tasks, events, notes, files, and more. The REST API enables integration with other apps such as email systems, marketing automation systems, or EMRs. All API communications require HTTPS. Each access token is allowed 250 queries per 5 minute window.
